expandingtechnologies.ponder.railroad_li: The Railroad Light Controller can be used to make railroad crossings a little more beautiful.
To use it, attach a Display Link targeted at Nixie Tubes.
Then, just power the block with Redstone to turn the lights on.
If you place a Note Block on top of the controller, a Dutch Railroad Bell will ring when turned on.
You can use Train Observers to detect upcoming trains.
Connect them to a Powered Toggle Latch using Redstone Links to power the block.
expandingtechnologies.ponder.door_contro: The Door Controller can be used to specify which train doors to open at a station using redstone.
When powering a specific side, that side of the train will have it's doors opened on arrival.
Multiple sides of the block can be powered to open doors on multiple sides of the train.
_: Thank you for translating Expanding Technologies!
